title: Westland Triple Care 80m2 Box
features: Fast results for a healthier & stronger lawn
description: Product Description Westland Triple Care is a lawn treatment that has been formulated to deal with weeds and moss without herbicides. Balanced NPK with the right amount of nitrogen aviods weak growth, whilst promoting strong and healhty roots. Your lawn will look greener in just 3 days. Directions Use the product from February to October. For best results, apply it to a dry lawn. Remove any debris or leaves from the lawn before application. Apply the product evenly across the lawn using a spreader. Water the lawn after application. Wait 3 days for greening results, and observe visible results on weeds and moss. Repeat the application if necessary. Always follow the manufacturer's instructions and safety guidelines. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of accidental ingestion, rinse mouth thoroughly and consult a healthcare professional if needed. Wear protective clothing, gloves, and eyewear during application. Avoid inhaling the product. Manufacturer Contact Information Westland Horticulture Limited, 14 Granville Industrial Estate, Granville Road, Dungannon, Co Tyrone, BT70 1NJ. See more
